action.reasoning: Observation: Train failed immediately due to deprecated 'verbose' arg in ReduceLROnPlateau (PyTorch 2.x+ removal); model.py/train.py truncated (incomplete generate/EOS logic, MathExprRecognizer wrapper, training loop, best-save, metrics logging, loss shift); exprate stuck ~0.07 with symbol/subscript errors and overgeneration on debug preds. Analysis: Core ResNet+spatial-attention LSTM is valid (steady loss drop to ~1.0, basic structures learned) but bugs in generate (no per-sample EOS stop, include EOS), forward loss alignment, truncation from incremental edits, and scheduler prevented progress; resume from best.pt possible. Decision: Supply COMPLETE non-truncated model.py (full classes, fixed generate with per-sample EOS stop/exclude sos/eos, default preprocess=256x1664 for detail), COMPLETE train.py (remove verbose, aligned CE loss on targets[:,1:], grad_clip, AdamW+ReduceLROnPlateau on val_exprate, bs=12, aug, resume best.pt, 20 epochs, full per-batch+epoch jsonl logging to metrics.jsonl, best/last saves); keep debug/predict (consistent with new defaults). Run full train+debug (expect ~35min) to fix bugs, improve exprate >0.08 via better preds, then will submit_eval next.
